SageBwd NVIDIA runtime is not ready for normal users yet.

This folder is only a pre-prepared staging environment for future official SageBwd integration.

Current state:
- not a supported training runtime
- Sage / SageBwd training is intentionally disabled in the current build
- kept only so the project can adapt quickly after the official SageBwd code is released

If you are not maintaining the SageBwd branch, please ignore this folder.
